matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $feature = Get-WindowsFeature Multipath-IO -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $claims = ''; if (Get-Command mpclaim.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $claims = (mpclaim.exe -s -d | Out-String) }; $installed = if ($feature) { [bool]$feature.Installed } else { $false }; [pscustomobject]@{ mpio_installed = $installed; mpclaim_available = [bool](Get-Command mpclaim.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); mpclaim_output = $claims.Trim() } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
